metadata.description: Angular CLI builders and schematics for Module Federation

metadata.scriptContent: tsup && mkdir -p dist/schematics/ng-add && cp src/schematics/*.json dist/schematics/ && cp src/schematics/ng-add/*.json dist/schematics/ng-add/ && cp src/builders/*.json dist/builders/

metadata.description: Core algorithms and runtime for Angular Module Federation
Nx Executors and Generators for Module Federation

metadata.scriptContent: tsup && cp src/executors.json ./ && cp src/generators.json ./ && mkdir -p dist/executors/application dist/executors/dev-server dist/executors/sync-types dist/generators/init && cp src/executors/application/*.json dist/executors/application/ && cp src/executors/dev-server/*.json dist/executors/dev-server/ && cp src/executors/sync-types/*.json dist/executors/sync-types/ && cp src/generators/init/*.json dist/generators/init/
ng build host && ng build remote
